title: Senior Financial Analyst - RBL Bank - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - RBL Bank - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with RBL Bank! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Noida team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About RBL Bank:
RBL Bank is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RBL Bank!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
